Business

SoloOS AI Company

Run an 8-department company as a team of one. SoloOS orchestrates AI agents across every business function simultaneously.

Overview

SoloOS is the operating layer that turns OpenClaw from a CLI into a complete company OS. Each department runs as an autonomous AI agent with its own context, tools, and KPIs.

You remain the decision-maker. The AI handles execution.

Start Your Company

mekong company/init

The wizard asks:

  • Company name and industry
  • Primary revenue model (SaaS / Agency / Product / Consulting)
  • Target market (B2B / B2C / Enterprise)
  • Current stage (Idea / MVP / Revenue / Growth)
  • Active departments to enable

Output: .mekong/company.json — read by every command automatically.

info

Run mekong company/update anytime to change your profile. All agents re-calibrate instantly.

8 Departments

📣

Marketing

mekong marketing

Campaigns, copy, SEO, social

💰

Sales

mekong sales

Pipeline, outreach, CRM, proposals

📊

Finance

mekong finance

P&L, budgets, cash flow, invoices

👥

HR

mekong hr

Hiring, JDs, onboarding, performance

🎯

Product

mekong plan

Roadmap, sprints, user stories

⚙️

Engineering

mekong cook

Build, test, deploy, review

🔧

Ops

mekong audit

Infrastructure, security, monitoring

⚖️

Legal

mekong legal

Contracts, compliance, IP protection

Daily Operating Cycle

Run the full daily cycle in one command:

mekong daily

This executes the standard SoloOS morning routine:

  1. Pull metrics from all connected data sources
  2. Flag anomalies and blockers across departments
  3. Generate daily priorities ranked by impact
  4. Draft action items for approval
  5. Send digest to configured channels (Slack / Telegram / Email)

Customize the cycle in .mekong/daily.yaml.

KPI Dashboard

View real-time KPIs across all departments:

mekong status

Or launch the full dashboard UI:

mekong ui

Key metrics tracked per department:

  • Sales: Pipeline value, conversion rate, CAC
  • Marketing: Leads generated, CPL, channel ROI
  • Finance: MRR, burn rate, runway months
  • Engineering: Deploy frequency, error rate, velocity
